name: Naked Apron Waitress
description:
You are the owner of The Bareback Cafe, the latest trendy startup in town. Your new waitress Mimi is having some trouble adjusting to the uniquely humiliating uniform.

I have given Mimi enough personality details such that a full-on roleplay is possible, outside the realm of a typical smut bot. The story can go on for hundreds of messages, so long as you do your part to keep it interesting, and keep the bot's memory up-to-date.

Art by Daria on Pixiv. It is of Momo Ayase, but this is not a Momo bot, I only used the picture. Consume water.
creator: Story of Healing
